ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "budget_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the total budget */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the main contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role within the project */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization providing funding */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the organization */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money allocated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the funding */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was allocated */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the funding record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency to a base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date when the project is expected to end
Total budget allocated for the project
Name of the main contact person
Name of the role within the project
Unique identifier for each funding record
Reference to the organization providing funding
Reference to the role of the organization

Date and time when the user account was created
Date and time when the user account was last updated
